comment: Wabistay state machine (H0). state → input → action → next state, plus all outbound message copy. Handlers in api/wabistay/webhook.js read this table — no nested if-state logic. Inputs are matched against the trimmed, lowercased message; "*" is the fallback row. "next" is the Session State the action writes (handlers control write ordering; a handler may stay in-state, e.g. invalid details or the F14 cooldown guard).

messages.greeting:
Hi! 👋 Welcome to {propertyName}{propertyCityLine}.

We currently have *{roomCountText}* available.

*Our rates:*
{rateText}

To make an *overnight booking*, please send:
1. Your full name
2. Check-in date (e.g. 25 June)
3. Check-out date (e.g. 27 June)

Send all three, each on a new line.

_For short stay bookings, reply HOURLY and we'll assist you._
messages.detailsReprompt:
Sorry, I didn't quite get that. Please reply with your:
1. Full name
2. Check-in date (e.g. 25 June)
3. Check-out date (e.g. 27 June)

Send each on a new line.
messages.etaConfirmed:
Perfect! We'll have your room ready for you. 🛏️

See you at *{eta}*.

When you arrive, reply with a number:
1 - I'm at the gate
2 - Cancel my booking

We look forward to hosting you at {propertyName}! 🌟
messages.gateNoRoomInfo: No rooms available — please assign manually.
messages.welcomeAssigned:
Welcome to {propertyName}! 🌟 You've been assigned *{roomName}*.

Someone is on their way to open the gate for you. Enjoy your stay!

When you're ready to leave, reply with a number:
1 - Check out
messages.welcomeUnassigned:
Welcome to {propertyName}! 🌟 We've notified someone to assist you at the gate.

Enjoy your stay! When you're ready to leave, reply with a number:
1 - Check out
messages.cancelled: Your booking has been cancelled. No problem at all — we hope to see you another time. 👋
messages.confirmedMenu:
Hi {guestName}! Your booking is confirmed. 🛏️

Reply with a number:
1 - I'm at the gate
2 - Cancel my booking
messages.gateCooldownMenu: Just checked you in — give it a minute before checking out. Reply 1 again in a bit if you still need to leave.
messages.checkedInMenu:
Hi {guestName}! You're checked in. 🛏️

Reply with a number:
1 - Check out
messages.cleanerDispatch:
Hi {cleanerName} 🧹 {roomName} has just been vacated. Please prepare it with fresh linen immediately.

Reply *DONE* when complete.
messages.checkoutThanks:
Thank you for staying with us at {propertyName}! 🌟

We hope you enjoyed your stay. You're welcome back anytime.

Safe travels! 👋
messages.cleanerThanks: Thank you! {roomName} is marked as clean and available. ✅
messages.ownerRoomCleaned: ✅ {roomName} has been cleaned and is now available for new bookings.
messages.cleanerNothingToClean: Thanks! No rooms currently marked for cleaning — nothing to update.
messages.cleanerWhichRoom: Which room? Reply with the room number or name. Currently cleaning: {roomList}
messages.unknownFallback: Hi! Reply with your name and dates to make a booking, or *CHECKING OUT* if you are leaving today.
messages.numberNotConfigured: Sorry, this number isn't configured yet. Please contact support.
